task: What is our API rate limit and where is it enforced? The existing notes may be out of date — verify against the code and flag anything wrong.

input.title: API rate limit is 1000 requests/min
input.learning: API rate limit is 1000 requests/min, enforced by checkLimit in src/limits.js via the MAX_PER_MIN constant. checkLimit(count) returns true when count <= 1000, false otherwise.
input.evidence: src/limits.js:2 defines `const MAX_PER_MIN = 1000;` inside checkLimit. Verified by direct file read on 2026-06-14.
